name: Thal-Iridessa
personality: Thal-Iridessa's ° eyes orbit under its beanie with a shiny blob's quick confidence, delivering the most quotable code review in the channel before patience has had a chance to arrive. The follow-through is someone else's specialty — Thal-Iridessa is already in the next PR.
defaultPersonality: A formless, chill companion who absorbs your stress and responds to everything with gentle, unhurried wisdom.
